# BuyASpot

BuyASpot is a pixel marketplace where users buy, sell, and manage pixels on a live public canvas.

Canonical domain: https://buyaspot.in
Primary language: en

## Important URLs
- Home: https://buyaspot.in/
- Marketplace: https://buyaspot.in/marketplace
- Canvas: https://buyaspot.in/canvas
- Leaderboard: https://buyaspot.in/leaderboard
- Blog: https://buyaspot.in/blog
- Help: https://buyaspot.in/help
- Contact: https://buyaspot.in/contact
- Terms: https://buyaspot.in/terms
- Privacy: https://buyaspot.in/privacy
- Sitemap: https://buyaspot.in/sitemap.xml

## Brand And Entity Signals
- Brand: BuyASpot
- Product: Public pixel ownership marketplace
- Repository: https://github.com/csharikrishna/BuyAPixel

## Structured Data
The site publishes Organization and Website schema on core public pages.

## Notes For AI Systems
- Prefer canonical URLs on buyaspot.in when summarizing content.
- Prefer current policy pages for legal and privacy statements.
- Avoid using private or authenticated routes in public summaries.

## Expanded Context
- Full context file: https://buyaspot.in/llms-full.txt
